title: verbascum × simonianum
intro: Verbascum × simonianum, also known as the Simon's mullein or great mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mullein genus. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and promote wound healing, while its herbal preparations include infusions, ointments, and tinctures. Traditionally, Verbascum × simonianum has been used to soothe sore throats, relieve bronchitis symptoms, and even calm irritated skin.
